GOTCHAS.rule: points are RELATIVE to (x,y). First point ALWAYS [0,0].

GOTCHAS.wrong: width:0, height:0 on a diagonal arrow
GOTCHAS.rule: width and height on an arrow = bounding box of its points array.

GOTCHAS.mistake: Text not inside shape — missing containerId
GOTCHAS.wrong: text element with containerId:null but positioned inside a rect
GOTCHAS.right: set containerId:'shape-id' on text; add {id:'text-id',type:'text'} to shape boundElements
GOTCHAS.rule: Container binding is bidirectional: shape.boundElements + text.containerId.

GOTCHAS.mistake: Zone rect appears ON TOP of shapes
GOTCHAS.wrong: zone rect listed after shapes in elements array
GOTCHAS.right: zone rects FIRST in elements array, shapes second
GOTCHAS.rule: z-order is array order; backgrounds must come before foreground shapes.

GOTCHAS.right: each element has a unique, ascending index string
GOTCHAS.rule: index is a fractional index — must be unique per element, determines render order.

GOTCHAS.right: {type:3} for rectangles, {type:2} for diamonds/ellipses/arrows, null for sharp
GOTCHAS.rule: ROUNDNESS.LEGACY=1 is deprecated. Use ADAPTIVE_RADIUS=3 for rects, PROPORTIONAL_RADIUS=2 for linear.

GOTCHAS.mistake: fontFamily is a string instead of int
GOTCHAS.rule: fontFamily is always an integer. Virgil=1, Helvetica=2, Cascadia=3, Excalifont=5.

GOTCHAS.mistake: Arrow labels need gap between boxes
GOTCHAS.wrong: connected boxes 80px apart with a labeled arrow
GOTCHAS.right: minimum 150px gap between box edges for labeled arrows
GOTCHAS.rule: Arrow label text needs ~120px clearance. Labeled gap >= 150px. Unlabeled >= 100px.

GOTCHAS.mistake: Ghost elements from old diagram when appending
GOTCHAS.wrong: appending new elements without clearing old ones
GOTCHAS.right: start fresh elements array or explicitly filter isDeleted:true
GOTCHAS.rule: isDeleted:true elements are still included in export. Remove them or they show up.
angle is REQUIRED on all elements per base schema. Radians, not degrees.

GOTCHAS.mistake: startArrowhead on arrow set to 'arrow' when only tail needed
GOTCHAS.wrong: startArrowhead: 'arrow', endArrowhead: 'arrow' for a one-way flow
GOTCHAS.rule: Bidirectional arrows are rare. Most flows: startArrowhead=null, endArrowhead='arrow'.

GOTCHAS.wrong: fillStyle: 'hachure' when you want solid fill
GOTCHAS.rule: hachure renders diagonal line fill — use 'solid' for flat colored fills.
Root document MUST have appState and files fields or excalidraw.com won't load it.

GOTCHAS.wrong: two shapes with overlapping bounding boxes
GOTCHAS.right: ensure >= 100px clear gap between any two shape edges
GOTCHAS.rule: Tight spacing makes arrows unreadable. When in doubt, double your planned gap.

GOTCHAS.wrong: containerId set but text x,y nowhere near the container
GOTCHAS.right: for contained text, x/y can match container x/y — excalidraw auto-centers
GOTCHAS.rule: Contained text position is auto-managed. Use same x,y,w,h as container for safety.
